name: @sealant/db
description: Shared PostgreSQL database package for control-plane state

scripts.db:generate: pnpm dlx --package drizzle-kit@1.0.0-beta.20 --package drizzle-orm@1.0.0-beta.20 drizzle-kit generate --config drizzle.config.ts
scripts.dev: pnpm dlx --package drizzle-kit@1.0.0-beta.20 --package drizzle-orm@1.0.0-beta.20 drizzle-kit studio --config drizzle.config.ts
